title: Team Collaboration, Review, Governance, and Decision Handoffs · Product Reasoning Brief: Review Contract
summary: Parallel contributors create hidden work, oversized changes, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and undocumented decisions. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp2 review contract increment in collaboration operating system and review evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.
Link problem evidence, issue, decision, change, review, verification, release, and follow-up through stable identifiers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract
steps.instruction:
theory case — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Review Contract contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence. For Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract, keep Review Contract connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Review Contract condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

hints: For Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Review Contract precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.
For Predict Review Contract · Theory Review Contract, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Code style approval is a complete review.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Code style approval is a complete review. That claim does not survive the predict review contract evidence boundary.

steps.title: Bound Review Contract · Theory Review Contract
steps.instruction:
theory case — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.

After tracing the worked code, choose the Review Contract application whose preconditions and limits still match the supplied case.

Evidence target: Bound Review Contract · Theory Review Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence. For Bound Review Contract · Theory Review Contract, keep Review Contract connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The worked example variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence. A defensible solution applies Review Contract, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to collaboration operating system and review evidence.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Code style approval is a complete review. This fails the Review Contract contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation (GitHub Docs current 2026-07-15) — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.

steps.title: Build Review Contract evidence · Theory Review Contract
steps.instruction:
Append a pp2-review-contract-sx74kw: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Build Review Contract evidence · Theory Review Contract.

For Build Review Contract evidence · Theory Review Contract, keep Review Contract connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

stimulus.title: Review Contract failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Code style approval is a complete review.

lines.label: required

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Review Contract, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.
Keep the artifact unchanged and rewrite the explanation so the current output appears intentional. That claim does not survive the repair the review contract defect evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the Review Contract model · Theory Review Contract
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Review Contract: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.

Evidence target: Defend the Review Contract model · Theory Review Contract.

For Defend the Review Contract model · Theory Review Contract, keep Review Contract connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.
